nodes.name: Opalton grasswren
nodes.summary: Opalton grasswren（Opalton grasswren，学名 Amytornis rowleyi），主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、气候变化、外来捕食者。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: 外来捕食者
nodes.summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The Opalton grasswren has not been official assessed by the International Union for Conservation of Nature, although it is not believed to be at risk. Some potential threats include habitat loss, introduced predators such as cats, and climate change, particularly in the form of wildfires
